2605.30385.title: LLMs Without Deep Neural Networks: New Architecture, Benefits and Case Study
2605.30385.paper_summary: The purpose of this article is to provide validation to my deep neural network alternative in the context of LLMs. Very recently, there has been a significant interest by Chinese researchers in a model called RBF network, as a substitute to standard DNNs, with increased explainability and higher accuracy. It turns out that my new model, discovered independently, is based on the exact same machinery. But with a major twist: it does not need DNN as it finds the global optimum of the loss function in closed form, in one iteration, thus eliminating the tedious training step. Here I provide a high-level overview of my technology, with case study and comparison to similar methods.
2605.30385.paper_summary_zh: 這篇文章的目的是在LLMs的背景下對我的深度神經網絡替代方案提供驗證。最近，中國研究人員對一種稱為RBF網絡的模型產生了重大興趣，作為標準DNN的替代方案，具有更高的可解釋性和更高的準確性。事實上，我的新模型是獨立發現的，基於完全相同的機制。但有一個重大轉折：它不需要DNN，因為它以封閉形式在一次迭代中找到損失函數的全局最優解，從而消除了繁瑣的訓練步驟。在這裡，我提供了我的技術的高層次概述，並附上案例研究和與類似方法的比較。
2605.30385.author: Vincent Granville et.al.
